$comment: Selector registry — the one place FWT's brittle UI strings live. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. testID preferred (copy-proof); text is a Maestro regex matching visible text OR a11y label. Anchors target the seeded 'Standard Tabata' QA fixture (src/qa/fixtures.ts).

edit-tabata.note: edit affordance on the seeded Standard Tabata timer

stop-confirm.note: confirm button in the system stop alert

send-feedback.note: Settings 'Send feedback' row (i18n about.feedback) — opens the canonical feedback sheet

feedback-bug-option.note: feedback sheet type option (i18n feedback.type.bug). Trailing .* matches the iOS merged a11y label — the card's Pressable sets accessibilityLabel `${title}. ${desc}`, so a bare full-match never hits (the documented iOS card-merge convention)

create-new.note: the timer-list create affordance (i18n timerList.createNew) — opens the editor with a blank EMPTY_TIMER (valid defaults, so Save succeeds with just a name). Used by the T4 survival flow.

name-input.note: the editor name TextInput (i18n editor.nameA11y). A real RN TextInput — in the a11y tree on both platforms.

survival-timer.note: T4 survival marker — a created timer name absent from the seed, so assertNot holds before create and assert can only pass if the new timer persisted. .* for the iOS merged card a11y label.
